outlook_paragraph: SM shows moderate drilling activity with 3 active sites at decision date, all continuously active and none newly activated, resulting in a relative activity delta of 1.5. With WTI averaging around $58 and realized prices at a discount of 12%, revenue is further influenced by only partial exposure to the targeted segment (55%). The deterministic revenue forecast for the quarter ending December 2019 is approximately $453.9 million, reflecting stable but unsurging operational momentum and mid-tier commodity pricing conditions.
